Metadata.title: BTC Price Guesser
Metadata.description: Predict if Bitcoin goes up or down after one minute. Sign in to play.

GameRules.title: BTC Price Guesser
GameRules.ruleGuess: Predict whether Bitcoin's price will be higher or lower one minute after you guess than it was when you tapped Up or Down.
GameRules.ruleResolution: After one minute, we compare the price at your guess to the price then. If it clearly went up or down by more than a tiny amount (about a cent), you win or lose. If it barely moves, or we can't get a reliable price for that moment, it's a tie after two minutes — your score stays the same.
GameRules.ruleScore: Score: +1 correct, -1 wrong, 0 tie. One guess at a time.

Auth.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

SignUpForm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

GuessButtons.keyboardHint: When a guess is available, you can press Arrow Up or Arrow Down to submit without using the mouse.

GuessButtons.waiting4: Life is a rollercoaster that goes up or down
GuessButtons.waiting5: Bitcoin making nerds richer since 2009 - Unknown
GuessButtons.waiting6: If you want proof bitcoin is real and they work, send them to me and I will use and show you
GuessButtons.waiting7: Keep calm and make more guesses
